headline: Apple is reportedly testing a MacBook Neo with more RAM
summary: Apple is reportedly developing an updated MacBook Neo. The new budget laptop will feature a new processor and more RAM. Plans also include refreshing the model with new colors.

headline: Here’s what Samsung’s smart glasses actually look like
summary: Samsung revealed its upcoming smart glasses, showcasing two new designs. First specs include an impressive 9-hour battery life. Developed with Google, Gentle Monster, and Warby Parker, launching this fall.

headline: How the Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 phones compare
summary: Samsung announced Galaxy Z Flip 8, Fold 8, and Fold 8 Ultra at Unpacked 2026. New foldable phones are set to launch on August 7th. Updates include minor design tweaks, not a major overhaul from previous models.

headline: Preorders for Samsung’s new Z Fold and Flip 8 come with up to $350 in gift cards
summary: Samsung's new Galaxy Z Flip 8, Fold 8, and Fold 8 Ultra are now available for preorder. Preorders come with up to $350 in gift cards. Devices launch on August 7th, starting from $1,199.99.

headline: The Samsung Odyssey G5 27" QHD 180Hz OLED Gaming Monitor Drops to $299.99 on Amazon
summary: Samsung Odyssey G5 27" QHD 180Hz OLED Gaming Monitor is on sale. Price dropped to an unprecedented $299.99 on Amazon. This makes it one of the most affordable OLED gaming monitors ever.

headline: Best Buy’s Black Friday in July Sale Features Great Kindle Deals, but They’re Going Fast
summary: Best Buy's Black Friday in July sale includes excellent Kindle deals. Select Kindle models are selling out quickly due to high demand. Act fast to grab your favorite Kindle at a discount.

headline: Star Trek Legend William Shatner and His Daughter Melanie Reveal They Battled Stage 4 Cancer at the Same Time
summary: William Shatner and his daughter Melanie revealed a shared health struggle. Both battled stage 4 cancer simultaneously. The Star Trek legend shared the personal news.

headline: Microsoft Announces Xbox Backward Compatibility on PC, With New Features and Achievements
summary: Microsoft announced Xbox Backward Compatibility for PC. Classic console games can now be played on PC and handhelds like Xbox Ally X. New features and achievements are included for PC players.

headline: PC Harper's widow criticises early prisoner release plan as Burnham to review scheme
summary: Lissie Harper, PC Harper's widow, condemned early prisoner release plans. Reports suggest two of PC Harper's killers could be freed early. Andy Burnham is set to review the controversial scheme.

headline: Most bus fares in England to be capped at £2 from January
summary: Most bus fares in England will be capped at £2 starting January. The government states this will help with the cost of living. The policy aims to provide financial breathing room for people.

headline: Ukrainian drones hit Russian online giant retailer Wildberries for second time
summary: Ukrainian drones struck Russian online retailer Wildberries. Logistics hubs in Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were targeted overnight. This marks the second attack on the retail giant.

headline: Ex-Southern Water boss among four charged over alleged plan to manipulate water quality tests
summary: Former Southern Water boss Matthew Wright faces charges. He and three others are accused of manipulating water quality tests. The alleged scheme aimed to save the company millions in penalties.
